'''laracha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myclozolin|myclozolin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myclozolin|myclozolin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| laracha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læræchæth|læræchæth]] || [[word:læræchæj|læræchæj]] || [[word:læræchæsh|læræchæsh]] || [[word:læræchæ|læræchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lararachath|lararachath]] || [[word:lararachaj|lararachaj]] || [[word:lararachash|lararachash]] || [[word:lararacha|lararacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:larachath|larachath]] || [[word:larachaj|larachaj]] || [[word:larachash|larachash]] || [[word:laracha|laracha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:larafchath|larafchath]] || [[word:larafchaj|larafchaj]] || [[word:larafchash|larafchash]] || [[word:larafchaf|larafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:larachatha|larachatha]] || [[word:larachaja|larachaja]] || [[word:larachasha|larachasha]] || [[word:larachaka|larachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:larachath|larachath]] || [[word:larachaj|larachaj]] || [[word:larachash|larachash]] || [[word:laracha|laracha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:larachathal|larachathal]] || [[word:larachajal|larachajal]] || [[word:larachashal|larachashal]] || [[word:larachakal|larachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:larachathatha|larachathatha]] || [[word:larachajaja|larachajaja]] || [[word:larachashasha|larachashasha]] || [[word:larachaka|larachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:larachathan|larachathan]] || [[word:larachajan|larachajan]] || [[word:larachashan|larachashan]] || [[word:larachakan|larachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:larachathaoro|larachathaoro]] || [[word:larachajaoro|larachajaoro]] || [[word:larachashaoro|larachashaoro]] || [[word:larachakaoro|larachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
